title: Integrated Wastewater Treatment Equipment For Industrial And Domest
summary: An integrated MBBR/MBR sewage treatment system that purifies industrial and domestic wastewater through microbial metabolism, combining biofilm and activated sludge methods. Its compact design suits both above-ground and underground installation.
bullets: High sludge concentration with superior denitrification
No easy blocking, no backwashing or backflow needed
Compact design for above-ground or underground install
Fully automatic operation for stable performance

specs.label: Treatment process
specs.value: MBBR (between activated sludge and fixed biofilm methods)
